articles.title: Economists Said AI Wouldn’t Take Jobs—Some Now Admit They Got It Wrong
articles.description: A new multi-university study surveyed 69 economists, 52 AI experts, and 38 superforecasters. All three groups agree: faster AI means fewer jobs.
articles.content:
